name: 暴打霸凌者
description: Ryan得知Andrea被欺負後暴打Paul，打到朋友喊「你真要打死他嗎」才停手。這個暴力行為既是護花的直接表達，也展現了男主「為她可以不顧一切」的性格。
tags: 拳頭揮打的暴力衝擊＋男主受傷的手與溫柔遞還助聽器的反差

examples.drama_title: 💗No One Dared Kiss the Bully CEO—Until a Rural Girl Did,Then He Can’t Stop Spoiling Her!#drama #ceo
examples.excerpt: Ryan, that's enough. Are you really going to beat him to death? / Didn't you hear they bullied Andrea? / Andrea cannot attend class without her hearing aid. I'll go to school first.
examples.context: 拳頭揮打的暴力衝擊＋男主受傷的手與溫柔遞還助聽器的反差
